title: Font Set Section
text: Font Set Section The font section defines information about characters in meta character sets. It is used to map the device definitions to Uniface features. begin_font Number Font0Character DeviceCharacterSequence { Description } ... end_font Delimiters Mnemonic Explanation begin_font Number Mark start of font definition. end_font Mark end of font definition. Arguments MetaSetNumber —meta character set number; 0 through 7; see Meta Character Sets . Font0Character —character from the Font 0 Meta Character Set . This may be either the character or the decimal value (^ nnn ) from the ‘KB’ or ‘Dec’ columns. DeviceCharacterSequence —character definition in the form: { MetaSetNumber . } Character If MetaSetNumber is omitted, character set 0 is assumed. Description —optional description or comments. They are often used to record the hexadecimal value and the appearance (view) of the character. The following definitions come from the P_SCREEN device table: ^BEGIN_FONT 0 ^^Fchar Dev_char(s) Hexa_decimal view Uniface Font_description ^SP ^SP 20 ! ! 21 !
